prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约44814名，2023年大幅后移至82164名（断档式下降），2024年回升至52970名，2025年基准约58346名；近4年波动剧烈，2023年异常后移后近两 年逐步回稳，但尚未恢复至2022年水平，整体呈震荡偏后移态势；2022年理科计划47人，2023年46人，2024年48人，2025年47人，2026年计划47人，连续 多年基本持平，无扩缩招信号，计划因素对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第114名，近年排名从2021年120名逐步上升至114 名，学校综合实力稳中有升；该校在2021-2026年声誉评价文件中均未出现，无显著正面或负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第101位，评价为「一般」，综合热度约 10.5万，短视频平台关注度处于中低水平，未出现报考热度异常信号；历史投档异常记录中亦无该校断档记录；第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，优势学 科实力相对有限，对高分考生吸引力一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业社会热度持续偏高，但内蒙古大学相关专业学科评估等 级不高；四川省2026年普通高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年（约46.3万）增加约15.6%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约32.9万，同比增加约15.5%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；内蒙古大学位于呼和浩特市，距四川较远，跨省就读的地域偏好相对较低，对本省考生吸引力有限；该校在四川招生计划 占比较小（约47人），属典型跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次58346名、招生计划持平、四川省考生规模大幅增加（+15.5%）导致竞争加剧、学校声誉平稳无额 外热度拉动、软科排名小幅上升但优势学科不足等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年小幅前移（更难进），预测最低位次约57346名，区间56846–57846名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 44,814; in 2023, it significantly dropped to 82,164 (a cliff-like decline); in 2024, it rebounded to 52,970; the 2025 baseline is about 58,346. Over the past 4 years, fluctuations have been severe. After the abnormal drop in 2023, it has gradually stabilized in the last two years but has not yet returned to the 2022 level, showing an overall volatile and slightly backward trend. In 2022, the science plan was 47 students; in 2023, 46; in 2024, 48; in 2025, 47; in 2026, the plan is 47 students. It has remained basically stable for many consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or reduction, and the plan factor has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 114th. In recent years, its ranking has gradually risen from 120th in 2021 to 114th, indicating a steady improvement in overall strength. The university has not appeared in reputation evaluation documents from 2021 to 2026, with no significant positive or negative public opinion events. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 101st, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 105,000. Short video platform attention is at a medium-low level, with no abnormal signals in application popularity. There are no records of admission breaks in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no disciplines rated A- or above, and the strength of advantageous disciplines is relatively limited, making it generally less attractive to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for science popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remains high, but the discipline evaluation levels of related majors at Inner Mongolia University are not high. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan Province is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (approximately 463,000). Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 329,000 physics category candidates, a year-on-year increase of about 15.5%, indicating a significant expansion in candidate numbers and intensified competition. Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, far from Sichuan, so the regional preference for cross-province study is relatively low, making it less attractive to local candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan is relatively small (about 47 students), typical of cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 58,346, a stable enrollment plan, a significant increase in the number of candidates in Sichuan Province (+15.5%) leading to intensified competition, a stable university reputation without additional popularity pull, a slight rise in Soft Science ranking but insufficient advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025 (harder to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is about 57,346, with a range of 56,846–57,846.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 56,800), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 57,800), it is advisable to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety options to avoid the risk of sliding.
